channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us

item.title: 2 people rescued when California pier partially collapses
item.description: A portion of the Santa Cruz Wharf has collapsed and is floating away Monday, according to the National Weather Service.
item.dc:creator: Alex Baker, KREX 5

item.title: Bill Clinton admitted to hospital with fever
item.description: Former President Bill Clinton was admitted to a Washington hospital on Monday with a fever, his spokesperson said on social media.
item.dc:creator: Sarah Fortinsky, ABC 4

item.title: Where is Santa? How to track his Christmas 2024 journey
item.description: Santa Claus, St. Nicholas, Babbo Natale, Père Noël — whatever you call him, the man clad in red will be here soon.
item.dc:creator: Addy Bink, ABC 4

item.title: Biden gives life in prison to 37 of 40 federal death row inmates before Trump can resume executions
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — President Joe Biden on Monday announced that he is commuting the sentences of 37 of the 40 people on federal death row, converting their punishments to life imprisonment just weeks before President-elect Donald Trump, an outspoken proponent of expanding capital punishment, takes of
item.dc:creator: WILL WEISSERT and DARLENE SUPERVILLE, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Officer fatally shot in a North Carolina supermarket, suspect in custody, police say
item.description: GREENSBORO, N.C. (AP) — A police officer responding to a report of a man with a gun inside a North Carolina supermarket was fatally shot Monday and a suspect was later taken into custody, authorities said.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Luigi Mangione's lawyer blasts New York officials for 'staged' perp walk
item.description: The attorney for Luigi Mangione, who has been accused of killing UnitedHealthcare CEO Brian Thompson, slammed New York City officials for what she referred to as a “staged” perp walk for her client last week.
item.dc:creator: Jared Gans, KRON4

item.title: Inside the state and federal charges against the man accused of killing UnitedHealthcare’s CEO
item.description: A triptych of criminal charges paints a searing, sometimes disparate portrait of the man accused of ambushing and killing UnitedHealthcare’s CEO Brian Thompson.
item.dc:creator: Michael R. Sisak, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Man faces murder charges in the death of a woman who was lit on fire in New York City subway
item.description: A man is facing murder and arson charges in New York City for allegedly setting a woman on fire inside a subway train and then watching her die after she was engulfed in flames, police said Monday.
item.dc:creator: ANTHONY IZAGUIRRE and SUSAN HAIGH, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Santa Cruz pier partially collapses amid heavy waves, 2 people rescued
item.description: (KRON) -- A portion of the Santa Cruz Wharf has collapsed and is floating away Monday, according to the National Weather Service. Three people went into the water when the pier section collapsed, according to the Santa Cruz Police Department.
item.dc:creator: Alex Baker, NewsNation

item.title: Bill Clinton hospitalized with fever but in good spirits, spokesperson says
item.description: Former President Bill Clinton was admitted Monday to Georgetown University Medical Center in Washington after developing a fever.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Adnan Syed's lawyers seek to reduce his prison sentence
item.description: Attorneys for Adnan Syed, whose legal case was chronicled in the hit podcast “Serial,” are seeking to have his prison sentence reduced.
item.dc:creator: Brian Witte, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: A history of the Panama Canal — and why Trump can't take it back on his own
item.description: PANAMA CITY (AP) — Teddy Roosevelt once declared the Panama Canal “one of the feats to which the people of this republic will look back with the highest pride.” More than a century later, Donald Trump is threatening to take back the waterway for the same republic.
item.dc:creator: WILL WEISSERT, JUAN ZAMORANO and GARY FIELDS, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Inside the Gaetz ethics report, a trove of new details alleging payments for sex and drug use
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — The House Ethics Committee's long-awaited report on Matt Gaetz documents a trove of salacious allegations, including sex with an underage girl, that tanked the Florida Republican's bid to lead the Justice Department.
item.dc:creator: LISA MASCARO and ALANNA DURKIN RICHER, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: VIDEO: Van bursts into flames inside California tunnel
item.description: Emergency crews responded to a vehicle fire inside the Caldecott Tunnel in the San Francisco Bay Area on Monday morning, according to the California Highway Patrol. Eastbound Highway 24 is shut down inside Bore 1 after a minivan caught fire at around 9:54 a.m.
item.dc:creator: Ryan Mense, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Taylor Swift makes $250,000 donation to Kansas City nonprofit
item.description: The global superstar made a $250,000 donation to Operation Breakthrough, a nonprofit that helps families in the city's urban core.
item.dc:creator: Shannon Rousseau, NewsNation

item.title: Biden didn't remove these 3 inmates from death row
item.description: Those who received the Monday commutations of their sentences saw them go from execution to life with no possibility of parole. However, three “hard cases” were not among the commutations.
item.dc:creator: Tara Suter, NewsNation

item.title: Live Updates: Greensboro police officer killed in shooting at Food Lion on Lawndale Drive
item.description: GREENSBORO, N.C. (WGHP) — A Greensboro police officer has died after a shooting that took place at a Food Lion in Greensboro on Monday, according to the Greensboro Police Department. At 10:45 a.m.
item.dc:creator: Brayden Stamps, NewsNation

item.title: The Container Store files for bankruptcy as sales slump
item.description: The Container Store joins the growing list of companies that have filed for bankruptcy this year, citing major economic challenges.
item.dc:creator: Joshua Hallenbeck, NewsNation

item.title: Third entangled endangered whale spotted in span of a week off East Coast
item.description: A third endangered whale has been spotted entangled in fishing gear off the East Coast, marking an alarming end to the year for a species threatened with extinction.
item.dc:creator: PATRICK WHITTLE, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Trump wants mass deportations. A ride-along with immigration officers shows the challenges
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — The immigration officers sat in their vehicles before dawn near a two-story building. A New York subway line rumbled overhead, then an officer's voice crackled over the radio. After watching for about two hours, he said, “I think that's Tango,” using a term for target. “Gray hoodie.
item.dc:creator: REBECCA SANTANA, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: How faith communities can be welcoming of believers with disabilities this holiday season and beyond
item.description: The Rev. Shannon Blosser sees how his son loves church — the music, the singing, the communion. But the United Methodist pastor said his family hasn’t always felt like 11-year-old Noah, who is autistic, has been welcome.
item.dc:creator: MARIAM FAM and LUIS ANDRES HENAO, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Chat with Santa or find out if you are on the naughty list with these tech features
item.description: We've moved past simply mailing your wish list to the North Pole. Santa has arrived on ChatGPT and you can talk to him.
item.dc:creator: Rich DeMuro, Fox 5

item.title: Ivy League suspect in UnitedHealthcare CEO's killing pleads not guilty
item.description: Luigi Mangione, the suspect accused of murdering UnitedHealthcare CEO Brian Thompson on Dec. 4 in Manhattan, pleaded not guilty in a Manhattan criminal court on Monday morning.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Luigi Mangione pleads not guilty to state charges in death of UnitedHealthcare CEO
item.description: The man accused of fatally shooting the CEO of UnitedHealthcare pleaded not guilty on Monday to murder and terror charges in a state case that will run parallel to his federal prosecution.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: The new right gathers to celebrate Trump and the splintering of the Republican Party
item.description: PHOENIX (AP) — As Washington heaved over the possibility of a partial government shutdown, leading far-right figures gathered with thousands of Donald Trump’s most ardent supporters and, for the most part, gloried in splintering the president-elect’s party.
item.dc:creator: BILL BARROW, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: New York City police apprehend suspect in the death of a woman found on fire in a subway car
item.description: New York City police announced Sunday they have in custody a “person of interest” in the early morning death of a woman who they believe may have fallen asleep on a stationary subway train before being intentionally lit on fire by a man she didn't know.
item.dc:creator: SUSAN HAIGH, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: 174 Colorado skiers and snowboarders rescued after a lift cracks
item.description: WINTER PARK, Colo. (AP) — Officials were investigating Sunday what caused a crack in a Colorado ski lift that forced the evacuation of over 170 stranded skiers and snowboarders.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Driver killed by police after driving truck through Texas mall, injuring 5
item.description: Authorities said the driver traveled "several hundred yards" through a JCPenney, injuring multiple people.
item.dc:creator: Abigail Jones, NewsNation

item.title: Blake Lively accuses 'It Ends With Us' director Justin Baldoni of harassment, smear campaign
item.description: In the complaint, Lively accuses Baldoni and the studio of embarking on a “multi-tiered plan” to damage her reputation following a meeting in which she and her husband Ryan Reynolds addressed “repeated sexual harassment and other disturbing behavior” by Baldoni and a producer on the movie.
item.dc:creator: Mallika Sen, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Trump taps 'Apprentice' producer, Mark Burnett, as special envoy to the United Kingdom
item.description: Mark Burnett, the power producer who helped reintroduce Donald Trump to a national television audience with “The Apprentice,” is being tapped by the president-elect as special envoy to the United Kingdom in his upcoming administration.
item.dc:creator: WILL WEISSERT, Associated Press, WFLA, NBC
